pi_items.source: Task description directly specifies this path
Task description directly specifies this path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the fells_loop.gpx dataset, which contains real GPS track and waypoint data created by ExpertGPS/TopoGrafix for the Middlesex Fells Reservation in Massachusetts. The expected output paths for the KML and CSV files are explicitly defined in the task description and match the metadata exactly.
